name: SapBusinessWarehouse.Cubes
signature: SapBusinessWarehouse.Cubes( server as text, systemNumberOrSystemId as text, clientId as text, optional optionsOrLogonGroup as any, optional options as nullable record ) as table
description: Returns a table of InfoCubes and queries grouped by InfoArea from an SAP Business Warehouse instance at server `server` with system number `systemNumberOrSystemId` and Client ID `clientId`. An optional record parameter, `optionsOrLogonGroup`, may be specified to control the following options:
